benefits.description: Retatrutide significantly reduces appetite and caloric intake
Retatrutide effective for weight loss through appetite suppression
Tesamorelin forces body towards anabolism and helps maintain and build muscle
MOTS-C improves glucose uptake into muscle and fat partitioning during surplus

protocol_notes: User has personal experience with retatrutide and notes it makes eating adequate calories 'nearly impossible' - describes mechanism as 'controlled starvation' for weight loss. Tesamorelin described as effective recomposition tool when combined with clean diet and hard training. MOTS-C described as metabolic adaptation peptide rather than direct fat loss agent.
